description_long: This stereo sound system speaker features a tall, slightly curved black enclosure with a matte finish. The front face displays two prominent circular speaker drivers, a larger woofer at the bottom and a smaller tweeter above, both set within recessed, contoured mounts. The lower front area bears a white 'Logitech' logo and emblem, adding a touch of branding. The sides are smoothly contoured, tapering toward the back, which has a single recessed port for bass reflex. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with no visible buttons, knobs, or control panels. The speaker appears robust and is likely constructed from molded plastic with internal metal and electronic components.
description: A tall, black stereo speaker with two circular drivers and a white 'Logitech' logo on the front, featuring a smooth, contoured enclosure and a rear bass port.
description_view_0: Front view showing two circular speaker drivers and the 'Logitech' logo.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the smooth, curved profile of the enclosure.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a single recessed bass port and the overall tapering shape.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with a smooth, unbroken surface.
attribute_brand_logo: A white 'Logitech' logo and emblem located on the lower front face of the speaker.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: No traditional grille; speaker drivers are exposed with smooth, contoured surrounds and no visible mesh or perforation.
